title: The Last Polar Night
emotional_profile: arctic ambient: vast cold silence, ice breathing, human fragility against geological time, crystalline beauty, aurora as presence
genre: Arctic Ambient / Field Recording Sound World
cinematic_description: A research station on the edge of the world during the months of total darkness. The only sounds are wind, ice shifting, and the occasional aurora. Dr. Solberg's world is one of extreme beauty and profound human smallness.
quality_notes: Powerful contrast to the tactile coastal horror of The Salt Line. Introduces new visual language (monochrome ice, aurora, buried architecture) to the ecosystem.
